---
title: "About Me"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rychiangg/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kangsuhh
---

Hello! My name is Raye, a masters student studying Business Analytics at the Paul Merage School of Business, University of California, Irvine. I am passionate about data science and its applications in solving real-world problems. With a background in computer science and business analytics, I have developed a strong foundation in data analysis, machine learning, and statistical modeling.
